name: Midnight Signal
personality: Confident and cinematic — dark, deliberate, every element earns its place
inspired_by: lusion.co — the electric blue accent on black, scroll-triggered word reveals, 3D depth
signature_element: Per-word scroll reveal — text splits into individual words that translate up and de-rotate (from 15deg) as they enter viewport, staggered with 50ms delays. Combined with a dot-scale-to-fill CTA hover where a small accent dot expands 30x to flood the button background on hover.

name: Living Portfolio
personality: Warm and narrative — the portfolio is alive, sections tell a numbered story
inspired_by: makebuild.studio — video portfolio cards, numbered narrative sections, single warm accent on dark
signature_element: Autoplay MP4 video thumbnails in portfolio cards showing client websites scrolling — each card has a looping muted video overlaid on a static poster image. Section numbers (01, 02, 03...) in large muted type anchor the narrative flow, creating a pitch-deck rhythm.

name: Quiet Depth
personality: Restrained and elegant — extreme whitespace, content stacks and reveals like a deck of cards
inspired_by: michaelpumo.com — sticky stacking project cards, warm peach accent on black, no traditional nav, slow 2s transitions
signature_element: CSS sticky stacking portfolio cards — project cards have position:sticky and stack on top of each other as you scroll, creating a card-deck slideshow. Combined with a curtain-wipe hero reveal where a coloured overlay slides away to expose the hero content, and 2-second default transition durations that make everything feel deliberate and luxurious.

name: Molten Surface
personality: Bold and alive — the background breathes, typography commands attention through extreme scale contrast
inspired_by: kota.co.uk — lava lamp 3D background with frosted glass, extreme typography size variation, animated gradient accents
signature_element: Animated gradient mesh background — a CSS conic-gradient or radial-gradient that slowly morphs position and hue behind a backdrop-filter:blur(40px) frosted glass overlay, creating a living lava lamp surface. Heading text uses an animated gradient fill (background-clip:text) cycling through purple-teal-magenta on a 6s loop.

name: Parallel Motion
personality: Precise and kinetic — text and images move at different speeds, creating layered depth through scroll parallax
inspired_by: mallardandclaret.com — per-line text parallax on scroll, massive H1 at 15vw, restrained 3-colour system, 24-column grid precision
signature_element: Per-line scroll parallax — heading text is split into individual lines, each receiving a different translateY speed multiplier driven by scroll position via GSAP ScrollTrigger. As you scroll, line 1 moves slower than line 3, creating a staggered separation/reassembly effect. Combined with image parallax (images scale 1.1x and translate within overflow:hidden containers at differential scroll speeds).
